subject: [PATCH v3 22/28] nfsd: send basic file attributes in CB_NOTIFY

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch adds the ability to send basic file attributes in a CB_NOTIFY event, allowing clients to receive information about the inode in addition to the filename. The attributes sent include type, change time, size, and other basic stats. This is achieved by using the GETATTR operation to retrieve the necessary information from the kernel. The approach taken is to modify the nfsd4_setup_notify_entry4 function to reserve space for the attribute mask and then use the vfs_getattr function to retrieve the attributes. The retrieved attributes are then encoded into the CB_NOTIFY event.
